== Notes for [[Item:Q105498|Q105498]] ==

[http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/James,_son_of_Alphaeus Wikipedia]

Mat 10:3; 11:1; 20:17, 18, 24; 26:20, 22, 26, 27, 30, 35, 36; Mark 3:18; 4:10; 6:7, 8, 10, 11, 12, 13, 30, 31, 32, 33; 9:14, 16, 28, 29, 31, 32, 33, 34, 35, 36; 10:10, 11, 13, 14, 15, 23, 24, 26, 27, 28, 29, 32, 33, 41, 42, 43, 44, 46; 11:11; 14:15, 17, 18, 19, 22, 23, 24, 25, 26, 27, 29, 31, 32; 16:14, 15, 19, 20; Luke 6:15, 16; 8:1; 9:1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 10, 12; 22:14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 20, 23, 24, 25, 26, 28, 30, 35, 36, 37, 38, 39, 40, 41, 45, 46; 24:10, 33; John 6:70

According to the following scriptures, Lebbaes Thaddaeus (also called Judas) is the brother of James, the son of Alphaeus:
Luke 6:16; John 14:22; Acts 1:13.

Mat 10:3; 11:1; 20:17, 18, 24; 26:20, 22, 26, 27, 30, 35, 36; Mark 3:18; 4:10; 6:7, 8, 10, 11, 12, 13, 30, 31, 32, 33; 9:14, 16, 28, 29, 31, 32, 33, 34, 35, 36; 10:10, 11, 13, 14, 15, 23, 24, 26, 27, 28, 29, 32, 33, 41, 42, 43, 44, 46; 11:11; 14:15, 17, 18, 19, 22, 23, 24, 25, 26, 27, 29, 31, 32; 16:14, 15, 19, 20; Luke 6:15, 16; 8:1; 9:1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 10, 12; 22:14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 20, 23, 24, 25, 26, 28, 30, 35, 36, 37, 38, 39, 40, 41, 45, 46; 24:10, 33; John 6:70

According to the following scriptures, Lebbaes Thaddaeus (also called Judas) is the brother of James, the son of Alphaeus:
Luke 6:16; John 14:22; Acts 1:13.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000003242945002

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]]
[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]][[Category:Pages]]
